name: friction tracker requires an ISO-8601 timestamp on every event and rejects events missing the at field
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/friction && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/friction-tracker.sh" --event hook-block --hook x --decision deny 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*at' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
